summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary

Z Hotels is a UK-based boutique hotel chain offering stylish, compact accommodations across multiple London locations (including Holborn, Covent Garden, Soho, Shoreditch, and others) as well as Bath, Glasgow, and Liverpool, with a focus on affordable, design-led stays in prime city-center spots.

The provided text also includes their **Job Applicant Privacy Notice**, which explains how Z Hotels collects and handles personal data during the recruitment process, covering data types, legal grounds for processing, data sharing, and retention policies for job applicants.
